title: Can an Anti-Inflammatory Diet with Olive Oil Actually Treat Psoriasis?
paper: Perez-Bootello et al., JAMA Dermatology (2025) — MEDIPSO Trial
finding: 16-week Mediterranean diet with EVOO achieved PASI 75 remission in 47.4% of psoriasis patients vs 0% in controls (P < .001)

title: Can an Olive Oil-Rich Diet Prevent Bone Loss as You Age?
paper: Vázquez-Lorente et al., JAMA Netw Open (2025)
finding: 924-person RCT: EVOO-rich Mediterranean diet protected lumbar spine BMD in women (P = .005) over 3 years

title: Can Two Tablespoons of Olive Oil a Day Treat Depression?
paper: Foshati et al., J Acad Nutr Diet (2022)
finding: 25 mL/day EVOO significantly reduced depression scores in severe MDD patients (P = .008)

title: Olive Oil vs Avocado Oil: Which Is Actually Healthier?
paper: Multiple studies meta-analysis
finding: EVOO wins on polyphenols and anti-inflammatory compounds; avocado oil wins on smoke point

title: Best Olive Oil Brand 2026: Lab-Tested and Ranked
paper: Original lab data analysis — 38 oils tested
finding: Pamako Monovarietal leads with 2,081 mg/kg polyphenols verified by qNMR

title: Can Olive Oil Replace Ibuprofen?
paper: Beauchamp et al., Nature (2005)
finding: Oleocanthal inhibits the same COX-1 and COX-2 enzymes as ibuprofen

title: The Compound in EVOO That Kills Cancer Cells
paper: Celano et al., Int J Mol Sci (2020)
finding: Oleocanthal triggers cancer cell death within 30 minutes in vitro

title: What 28 Years of Data Say About Olive Oil and Your Brain
paper: Harvard T.H. Chan School of Public Health (2024)
finding: Higher olive oil intake linked to 28% lower dementia mortality risk

title: How Olive Oil Polyphenols Reshape Your Microbiome
paper: Ferraris et al., Nutrients (2023)
finding: EVOO polyphenols increase Bifidobacteria and reduce gut inflammation markers

title: What Dermatology Research Says About Olive Oil for Skin
paper: Multiple dermatology studies review
finding: Hydroxytyrosol in EVOO shows UV-protective and anti-aging properties

title: Can Olive Oil Actually Help Your Hair? The Evidence
paper: Trichology and nutrition studies
finding: Oleic acid penetrates the hair shaft; polyphenols reduce scalp inflammation

title: The EU's Only Approved Health Claim for Olive Oil
paper: EU Regulation 432/2012, EFSA Panel
finding: 250mg/kg polyphenols proven to protect blood lipids from oxidative stress

title: Why Blue Zone Centenarians Drink Olive Oil Daily
paper: Buettner, National Geographic Blue Zones Project
finding: Populations consuming 40-60ml EVOO daily live 8-10 years longer on average

title: 2 Tablespoons a Day Dropped Blood Pressure by 7 Points
paper: Doménech et al., PREDIMED Trial (2014)
finding: Mediterranean diet with EVOO reduced systolic BP by 7.1 mmHg vs control

title: The Science Behind EVOO's Effect on LDL Cholesterol
paper: Covas et al., Annals of Internal Medicine (2006)
finding: High-polyphenol EVOO increased HDL and reduced oxidized LDL significantly

title: Hydroxytyrosol: The Most Powerful Antioxidant in Food
paper: Visioli et al., European Journal of Nutrition (2019)
finding: Hydroxytyrosol has 10x the antioxidant capacity of green tea catechins

title: Can Olive Oil Reverse Fatty Liver Disease?
paper: Priore et al., Frontiers in Nutrition (2022)
finding: EVOO polyphenols reduced hepatic fat accumulation by 30% in 12-week trial

title: How EVOO Fights Chronic Inflammation at the Cellular Level
paper: Lucas et al., Current Pharmaceutical Design (2011)
finding: EVOO phenolics downregulate NF-kB and COX-2 inflammatory pathways

title: Does Olive Oil Help or Hurt Weight Loss?
paper: Beulen et al., European Journal of Nutrition (2018)
finding: Mediterranean diets rich in EVOO do not cause weight gain despite high fat content

title: How Olive Oil Polyphenols Stabilize Blood Sugar
paper: Schwingshackl et al., Nutrition & Metabolism (2017)
finding: EVOO improved insulin sensitivity and reduced HbA1c in type 2 diabetes patients

title: Oleocanthal for Joint Pain: What Rheumatology Studies Show
paper: Scotece et al., Life Sciences (2013)
finding: Oleocanthal inhibited cartilage degradation enzymes in osteoarthritis models
